description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a hooded sweatshirt with a multicolored tie-dye pattern and geometric logos on the chest and sleeves. He wears fitted black pants and classic low-top sneakers, giving him a relaxed yet modern streetwear look. The figure has short, neatly styled hair and is wearing glasses, adding a touch of personality and realism. His hands are relaxed and slightly apart from his body, and his facial features are well-defined, with a neutral expression. The hoodie has a front pocket and drawstrings, and the pants are slim-fitting, complementing the overall silhouette. The figure's proportions and details suggest he is designed to represent a typical urban pedestrian.
description: A casually dressed adult male in a hooded sweatshirt, fitted pants, and sneakers, with glasses and short hair, embodying a modern urban pedestrian.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, glasses, hoodie with geometric logo, and relaxed arm posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile, hood shape, sleeve logo, and sneaker details.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hood, hair, and the gradient pattern on the sweatshirt.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile, sleeve logo, and the relaxed hand position.
attribute_clothing_type: casual hooded sweatshirt and fitted pants with low-top athletic footwear
